descriptionTemplate: Tinct gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Tinct's "Strike" Base DMG +[Arg2]%, and all of Tinct's cards gain 1 random effect, removed at the end of combat.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Tinct gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus, {Rouse}: Tinct's "Strike" Base DMG +[Arg2]%, all of Tinct's cards gain 1 random effect, which will be removed at battle end. The first time Tinct plays a "Skill" each turn, generate 1 Temporary "Strike" with 0 Arithmetica Cost.
